title: How to Make a Shiva Call: What to Say and What Not to Say
title_zh: 如何进行犹太守丧期探访：该说什么、不该说什么
title_he: איך לבצע ביקור ניחום אבלים: מה לומר ומה לא לומר
chinese_parallels: Confucian concept of ren (仁) - humaneness and caring for others in need
Traditional Chinese mourning periods and funeral customs
The value of quiet presence and silent support
historical_context: The practice of sitting shiva and receiving condolence visits dates back to biblical times (Job 2:13), corresponding to China's Spring and Autumn Period (春秋时代, 770-476 BCE).
